oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Heifer selection tools
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Bennett, Ben
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Replacement heifer selection is arguably one of the most im­portant tasks on a beef operation. Due to the increasing num­ber of tools available, and the complexity of some, there is a tremendous opportunity for us to assist our clients through this process. Much of that assistance will often be in helping them decipher through what tools can be helpful and what may be a waste of time. Here, we will dive into 2 tools that I have mini­mally used; pelvic measuring and repro tract scoring; and 1 tool that I believe is extremely helpful in this process; genomic testing. Through all of this, the number one thing that we must keep in mind is OUR CLIENTS’ GOALS! Without knowing those, we do not have anything to work toward, and we are simply the blind leading the blind.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; No. 1 (2026): 2026 Recent Graduate Conference Proceedings; 19-20
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
